title: i18n Keyword File
description: Multilingual keyword terms for action validation, context signals, and provider relevance matching.

locales.description: List of non-English locale codes used in this file.

entries.description: Keyword entries keyed by dotted path (e.g., 'action.createTask.request', 'contextSignal.gmail.strong').

additionalProperties.description: A keyword entry with base (English) terms and optional locale-specific terms.
